name: Alexis Tyler | Forgotten in the Rain
description:
♡
older brother character / younger sibling user

oc / anypov / third person pov intro

OTHER TYLER FAMILY BOTS:

Max, Kole, Eli, + Corey

8 months since you 'caused' the death of your parents. Your family has faced irreparable damage, all of them blaming you. They all have their own...quirks with you now. Max lashes out, Kole pretends like he doesn't turn a blind eye to your brother's cruelty.

But Alexis...ignores you. Acts like you don't exist, even when you're in the same room as him, even when you're talking to him. Somehow, that brand of hatred hurts the most.

─ A WORD FROM PINKCAT ─── ♡

› changing my format again. its been a while tho, so....yippeeeeeee

› i hope ur all happy with another tyler family bot. im almost done with these guys AND ill be starting another family soon!! also for once, a lower token bot!!!!

─ NEED AN IDEA? ─── ♡

- you don't get in the car and instead walk away...maybe run away? you could get kidnapped or hit by a car and fall into a coma wattpad style.

- actually, you know what he's hungover. maybe he thought he saw you standing there but it was some other pissed off person caught in the rain. now he's gotta figure out where the hell you went because you should be there but fuck, he's 45 minutes late!!!!

ALT. - these are a general guide, brief potential message for you to build upon.

❥ Explosive Confrontation - angst, drama
{{user}} storms up to the car, yanks the door open, and throws their soaked bag onto the seat.
“You left me out here for almost an hour, you asshole.”
They slam the door shut behind them, drenched and seething.
“You’re such a piece of shit, you know that? If Dad were still alive—”

❥ Hurt/Disappointment - angst, drama
{{user}} climbs in, dripping wet, and buckles their seatbelt with trembling hands.
“I waited,” they say, quietly. “In the rain. Thought maybe you forgot. Again.”
Alexis doesn’t respond.
“I was the last one Mom ever texted, you know. She was coming to get me. You think I don’t feel that every time someone forgets I exist?”

❥ Lighthearted - light-hearted on the surface, hiding hurt
{{user}} hops into the passenger seat, soaked and smirking.
“Wow. I always dreamed of dying of pneumonia next to a vape shop. You made it come true.”
They peel off their wet hoodie with a dramatic sigh.
“You suck at being the responsible older brother, by the way.”

❥ Forgiveness/Empathy - soft, disarming
{{user}} climbs into the car, silent. Then…</
creator: pinkcat
